text: My teacher explains difficult ideas in a way I can understand.
I feel comfortable asking my teacher for clarification when I am confused.
My teacher treats students fairly during lessons and assessments.
My teacher listens carefully when students express their opinions.
I receive useful academic feedback from my teacher.
My teacher encourages me to improve even when I make mistakes.
I trust my teacher's advice about my studies.
My teacher notices when students are struggling.
The classroom atmosphere created by my teacher feels supportive.
I feel respected by my teacher as a learner.
I feel motivated to attend my classes regularly.
I feel emotionally drained after dealing with academic tasks.
I feel confident about my ability to complete academic work successfully.
I can stay calm when academic pressure increases.
I find it difficult to relax because of my studies.
I feel satisfied with my overall learning experience.
I feel nervous before classes, tests, or deadlines.
I manage my study responsibilities effectively.
I feel mentally exhausted because of university work.
I feel positive about my progress as a student.
